title: Cellular profiling identifies targetable T cell phenotypes in lymphocytic variant hypereosinophilic syndrome.
author_string: Tefft, Kristy, Wang, Amy, Reinstein, Zachary Z, Zhang, Yue, Pillai, Arundhati et al.
abstract: With cell-by-cell mapping, we charted immune cells in lymphocytic-variant hypereosinophilic syndrome, found drug targets, and showed targeted therapy removed disease-causing cells and eased symptoms.
